# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a short description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

---

## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

* [ ] Bug Fix
* [ ] New Feature
* [ ] Enhancement
* [ ] Refactoring
* [ ] Performance Improvement
* [ ] Documentation Update
* [ ] UI Improvement
* [ ] Testing
* [ ] Build / Tooling
* [ ] Other

---

## Related Issue

Link any related GitHub issue.

Example:

```text
Closes #12

Fixes #34

Related to #56
```

---

## What Changed?

Describe the modifications included in this pull request.

Example:

```text
Added new workflow complexity calculations.

Improved dependency graph analysis.

Updated dashboard visualization.
```

---

Select all affected modules.

* [ ] Overview

## Testing Performed

Describe how changes were tested.

Example:

```text
Tested on Windows 11

Tested on Ubuntu

Verified dashboard rendering

Verified workflow analysis output
```

---

## Screenshots

If applicable, include before/after screenshots.

---

## Performance Impact

Does this change affect performance?

* [ ] No
* [ ] Yes

If yes, describe the impact.

---

## Breaking Changes

Does this introduce breaking changes?

* [ ] No
* [ ] Yes

If yes, describe the changes and migration steps.

Have relevant documentation files been updated?

* [ ] Yes
* [ ] No

Documentation includes:

installation-guide.md

## Checklist

Before submitting, verify:

* [ ] Code builds successfully
* [ ] Changes have been tested
* [ ] No unnecessary files included
* [ ] Documentation updated where required
* [ ] Existing functionality remains intact
* [ ] Code follows project conventions

Provide any additional context that reviewers should know.
